title: Extended Peripherals
description: Adds more functionality to computercraft peripherals.
body:
Adds more functionality to computercraft peripherals.

The functions added to peripherals are as follows:

+ `getBlockName`: gets the name of the block that the peripheral is attached to.
+ `getBlockData`: gets block nbt data that both minecraft and other mods add.
+ `getBlockStates`: gets block states that can be used to determine states that affect a block's visuals, like direction or whether a furnace is on.
